form.formComment: Two-year-old colt having first start by first season sire Jungle Cat out of Great Fox. Was second in a Beaudesert trial over 900m March 19. Market the best pointer.

form.formComment: Two-year-old gelding (Hellbent - Jalan Jalan) has trialled on three occasions leading into today's race. Won a trial over 1000m at Gold Coast on March 27. Looks to have talent so do not underestimate.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Two-year-old gelding (Hellbent - Jalan Jalan) has trialled on three occasions leading into today's race. Won a trial over 1000m at Gold Coast on March 27. Looks to have talent so do not underestimate.

form.formComment: Two-year-old colt making debut by Nicconi out of I'm Gunna Cashew. Purchased for AUD $ 190,000 (Magic Millions 2025 Gold Coast National Yearling Sale). Was second in a 900m trial on March 19 at Beaudesert. Watch the market carefully.

form.formComment: Gelding by Dubious facing the starter for the first time. Finished fourth in a Beaudesert trial over 900m on March 19. Wait and see what he can do.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign fourth of 8 at Eagle Farm in the G3 Bj Mclachlan December 27 over 1200m, soft track; 5 len behind Zip Lock carrying 55kg at $15. On debut fourth of 8 at this track Debut 2yo SW December 19 over 1000m, 1.4 len behind Lumbini with 55kg at $31. Big return expected despite the wide draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid out approaching and rounding the home turn.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation second of 7 at Toowoomba 2yo Mdn-Sw December 6 over 1000m, a neck behind Tosen Sabi carrying 54kg at $1.26. On debut second of 11 at Sunshine Coast 2yo Hcp November 22 over 1000m, 1.3 len behind Scartoon with 57kg at $14. Promising type with definite claims.

form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, set the pace for much of the race 2nd of 8 at Ipswich 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 1100m, neck behind Duke Of Albemarle carrying 56kg at $1.65. In good hands and should make progress into this run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5.5). Was well-supported at debut, set the pace for much of the race 2nd of 8 at Ipswich 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 1100m, neck behind Duke Of Albemarle carrying 56kg at $1.65. In good hands and should make progress into this run.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 8 at Ipswich 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 1100m, 3.5 len behind Duke Of Albemarle carrying 56kg at $5. Previously second-up 4th of 11 at Sunshine Coast 2yo Hcp on November 22 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Scartoon with 56.5kg at $6. Rates highly and can improve with a run under the belt.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Second-up. First-up after four months sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 8 at Ipswich 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 1100m, 3.5 len behind Duke Of Albemarle carrying 56kg at $5. Previously second-up 4th of 11 at Sunshine Coast 2yo Hcp on November 22 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Scartoon with 56.5kg at $6. Rates highly and can improve with a run under the belt.

form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, 3rd of 7 at Ipswich 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 800m, 1.2 len behind Lonesome Star carrying 56.5kg at $3. Can only improve on that run and is the testing material.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Was well-supported at debut, 3rd of 7 at Ipswich 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 800m, 1.2 len behind Lonesome Star carrying 56.5kg at $3. Can only improve on that run and is the testing material.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; only one run when raced behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 10 at Doomben in the LR Phelan Ready on December 6 over 1110m, 5 len behind Itchintogo with 55kg at $21. Big chance in this softer assignment.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5). Resuming after a break; only one run when raced behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 10 at Doomben in the LR Phelan Ready on December 6 over 1110m, 5 len behind Itchintogo with 55kg at $21. Big chance in this softer assignment.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced greenly under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: Was at a huge quote at debut, raced on the speed throughout before fading to run last of 7 at Eagle Farm 2yo Hcp on February 14 over 1000m, on a slow track; 11 len behind Pembrey with 56.5kg at $71. Won't find this any easier so she is hard to recommend.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6.5). Was at a huge quote at debut, raced on the speed throughout before fading to run last of 7 at Eagle Farm 2yo Hcp on February 14 over 1000m, on a slow track; 11 len behind Pembrey with 56.5kg at $71. Won't find this any easier so she is hard to recommend.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 900m, shifted out before being corrected.
